english: Left Snake Creeps Down and Golden Rooster Stands on Left Leg
visual: Drops into a low side stance with one leg extended flat along the floor and hand sweeping along the inside of that leg, then rises onto that leg lifting the opposite knee high with hand raised.
motion_description: The movement begins with a deep sink onto a bent right leg while the left leg extends flat along the floor to the side, allowing the left hand to sweep downward along the inside of the left leg. The weight smoothly shifts forward onto the left leg as the torso turns left to align with the leading foot. In a continuous, deliberate flow, the body rises to stand balanced on the straight left leg, drawing the right knee up to waist height. Simultaneously, the right arm lifts vertically in front of the body with fingers pointing up, while the left hand presses down near the left hip, ending in a steady, controlled pause.
